data.title: Stratasys Files Annual Report on Form 20-F for the Year Ended December 31, 2025
data.description: Stratasys Ltd. has officially submitted its annual report on Form 20-F for the fiscal year that concluded on December 31, 2025. This report, including the audited financial statements for 2025, has been filed with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC). Interested parties can view the report on the SEC's website, http://www.sec.gov, or access it through Stratasys' investor relations website. The company's stock trades on the Nasdaq under the ticker symbol SSYS.

data.title: Modular Genetics, Inc. joins New American Industrial Alliance to Reindustrialize America
data.description: Modular Genetics, Inc. (Modular) has recently revealed its partnership with the New American Industrial Alliance (NAIA), a prominent multi-sector trade association in the USA. This collaboration aims to enhance Modular's efforts in constructing and managing cutting-edge biomanufacturing infrastructure across the country. NAIA's focus lies in bolstering America's position as a global leader in technology and industry. Comprising manufacturers, builders, investors, and various stakeholders, NAIA will support Modular in advancing its plans. This strategic move is set to propel Modular's growth and influence, marking a significant milestone in the company's trajectory.

data.title: Herpes Virus Fluidizes Cell Nuclei to Multiply Faster
data.description: A recent study revealed that the herpes simplex virus has the ability to partially liquefy the dense, gel-like substance within human cell nuclei. This process allows the virus to replicate more rapidly. The focus of the research is on the genetic equipment located in the nucleus of each human cell, which is critical for the copying process. This discovery sheds light on the virus's tactics for replication and highlights the intricate ways in which it interacts with host cells. The findings provide valuable insights into the mechanisms behind viral infections and could potentially aid in developing more effective treatment strategies against herpes.

data.title: Smart Glasses, Rebuilt for Privacy: Brilliant Labs, Neuphonic & TheStage AI Move AI Off the Cloud
data.description: A partnership between Brilliant Labs, Neuphonic, and TheStage AI has been formed in London to advance frontier AI in wearable technology. The collaboration aims to eliminate the issues of latency and privacy concerns associated with cloud computing. Presently, AI inference like audio or image analysis depends on cloud-hosted models, leading to delays and potential data breaches. This new partnership focuses on shifting processing to consumer hardware to safeguard user data and prevent unnecessary latency.

data.title: KBRA Releases Research – Mass Transit Funding Pause: A Post-2025 Shutdown Update
data.description: A recent report by KBRA analyzes the impact of the Trump Administration's decision to halt funding for various mass transit projects. The pause in funding, announced in October 2025, affects four significant infrastructure projects. The reasoning behind the pause is a review of administrative contracting practices. According to KBRA, this suspension of federal funding will have significant consequences on infrastructure investment.

data.title: Dollar-cost averaging BTC proven as safest for long-term gains: Backtested data and models reveal it's best for investing in Bitcoin. Will it work in the next bull market?
data.description: Recent analysis of historical data and predictive models has revealed that utilizing a dollar-cost averaging strategy when investing in Bitcoin proves to be the most effective method. This strategy involves consistently purchasing a set amount of Bitcoin at regular intervals, regardless of the price fluctuations. The analysis has shown that this approach minimizes the risk of making large investments at inopportune times by spreading out the purchases over time. Moving forward, the question remains whether this strategy will continue to perform well during the anticipated upcoming bull market. Data suggests that dollar-cost averaging has historically provided strong returns and stability in volatile markets, making it a viable option for investors looking to capitalize on the potential growth of Bitcoin in the future.

data.title: Coda Octopus Group Sets Fiscal First Quarter 2026 Earnings Conference Call for Tuesday, March 17, 2026, at 10 a.m. Eastern Time
data.description: Orlando, Florida - March 5, 2026 - Coda Octopus Group, Inc. ("CODA" or the "Company") (NASDAQ: CODA), a leading global provider of real-time 3D/4D/5D and 6D imaging sonar technology for immediate subsea analysis and cutting-edge augmented reality diving technology ("DAVD"), has announced plans to hold a conference call on Tuesday, March 17, 2026, at 10:00 a.m. EST. The call will focus on the results of its Fiscal First Quarter 2026, which concluded on January 31, 2026. The Company will release a press statement revealing these findings prior to the commencement of trading on March 17, 2026.

data.title: Facephi, experts in digital identity and fraud prevention in regulated environments, publishes a Compliance Pocket Guide for the South African financial sector
data.description: Facephi, a company specializing in digital identity and fraud prevention for regulated industries, has released a Regulatory Compliance Pocket Guide tailored for the financial sector. The guide is designed to assist companies in ensuring regulatory compliance and avoiding fraud. The pocket guide covers important regulatory requirements and best practices for the financial industry. Facephi's expertise in this area makes it an invaluable resource for companies looking to strengthen their compliance measures.
